Name: MyTweak (Wrath) Next Action
Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Description: Shows your FFXIV next Single-Target / AoE action and burst state from the MyTweak plugin, and toggles burst. Talks to MyTweak's local API (127.0.0.1).

Actions.Name: Next ST Action
Actions.Tooltip: Shows the next single-target action your rotation would use.

Actions.Name: Next AoE Action
Actions.Tooltip: Shows the next AoE action your rotation would use.

Actions.Name: Burst Toggle
Actions.Tooltip: Shows ARMED / HELD and toggles burst hold/resume when pressed.
